title: Create two-way relative frequency tables
description: Practice creating two-way relative frequency tables from a two-way frequency table.
topic_path: Using data displays to find associations

assessment_items.question_content:
The two-way frequency table below shows data on playing a sport and playing a musical instrument for students in a class.

**Complete the following two-way table of row relative frequencies.**   
(If necessary, round your answers to the nearest hundredth.)

 | Plays sports | Does not play sports
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Plays a musical instrument**  | $6$| $7$
**Does not play a musical instrument** | $8$ | $3$ 



 | Plays a sport | Does not play a sport | Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Plays a musical instrument**  | [[☃ numeric-input 1]]| [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | $1.00$
**Does not play a musical instrument** | [[☃ numeric-input 3]] | [[☃ numeric-input 4]] | $1.00$
hints:
Frequency table with row totals:

 | Plays sports | Does not play sports | Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Plays a musical instrument**  | $6$| $7$ |  $\blue{13}$
**Does not play a musical instrument** | $8$ | $3$ | $\pink{11}$

**Two-way table of row relative frequencies:**

 | Plays sports | Does not play sports | Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Plays a musical instrument**  | $\dfrac{6}{\blue{13}} \approx 0.46$| $\dfrac{7}{\blue{13}} \approx 0.54$ |  $\dfrac{\blue{13}}{\blue{13}} = 1.00$
**Does not play a musical instrument** | $\dfrac{8}{\pink{11}} \approx 0.73$ | $\dfrac{3}{\pink{11}} \approx 0.27$ | $\dfrac{\pink{11}}{\pink{11}} = 1.00$

assessment_items.question_content:
The two-way frequency table below shows data on years working with the company and college degree status for Tom's coworkers.

**Complete the following two-way table of row relative frequencies.**   
(If necessary, round your answers to the nearest hundredth.)

 | At company less than $2$ years | At company $2$ or more years 
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**College degree**  | $5$| $14$
**No college degree** | $16$ | $7$ 

 | At company less than $2$ years | At company $2$ or more years| Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**College degree**  | [[☃ numeric-input 1]]| [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | $1.00$
**No college degree** | [[☃ numeric-input 3]] | [[☃ numeric-input 4]] | $1.00$
hints:
Frequency table with row totals:

 | At company less than $2$ years | At company $2$ or more years| Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**College degree**  | $5$| $14$|  $\blue{19}$
**No college degree** | $16$ | $7$ | $\pink{23}$

**Two-way table of row relative frequencies:**

 | At company less than $2$ years | At company $2$ or more years| Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**College degree**  | $\dfrac{5}{\blue{19}}\approx 0.26$| $\dfrac{14}{\blue{19}}\approx 0.74$ |  $\dfrac{\blue{19}}{\blue{19}} = 1.00$
**No college degree** | $\dfrac{16}{\pink{23}}\approx 0.70$ | $\dfrac{7}{\pink{23}}\approx 0.30$ | $\dfrac{\pink{23}}{\pink{23}} = 1.00$

**Did not block the goal** | $8$ | $5$ 

 | Placebo | Luck potion | Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:

**Did not block the goal** | $8$ | $5$ | $\maroonD{13}$

**Blocked the goal**  | $\dfrac{30}{\blueD{53}}\approx 0.57$| $\dfrac{23}{\blueD{53}}\approx 0.43$ | $\dfrac{\blueD{53}}{\blueD{53}}=1.00$
**Did not block the goal** | $\dfrac{8}{\maroonD{13}}\approx 0.62$ | $\dfrac{5}{\maroonD{13}}\approx 0.38$ | $\dfrac{\maroonD{13}}{\maroonD{13}} = 1.00$

assessment_items.question_content:
Kamden is a mind-reading alien. He had each friend draw and look at a card, then he guessed whether the card had a star on it.

The two-way frequency table below shows data on guess and true status of the cards the friends drew.

**Complete the following two-way table of row relative frequencies.**   
(If necessary, round your answers to the nearest hundredth.)

 | Kamden guessed a star | Kamden guessed not a star
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Card had a star**  | $4$| $2$
**Card didn't have a star** | $1$ | $752$ 

 | Kamden guessed a star | Kamden guessed not a star | Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Card had a star** | [[☃ numeric-input 1]]| [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | $1.00$
**Card didn't have a star** | [[☃ numeric-input 3]] | [[☃ numeric-input 4]] | $1.00$
hints:
Frequency table with row totals:

 | Kamden guessed a star | Kamden guessed not a star | Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Card had a star**  | $4$| $2$|  $\blue{6}$
**Card didn't have a star** | $1$ | $752$  | $\pink{753}$

**Two-way table of row relative frequencies:**

 | Kamden guessed a star | Kamden guessed not a star | Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Card had a star**  | $\dfrac{4}{\blue{6}}\approx 0.67$| $\dfrac{2}{\blue{6}}\approx 0.33$ |  $\dfrac{\blue{6}}{\blue{6}} = 1.00$
**Card didn't have a star** | $\dfrac{1}{\pink{753}}\approx 0.00$ | $\dfrac{752}{\pink{753}}\approx 1.00$ | $\dfrac{\pink{753}}{\pink{753}} = 1.00$

assessment_items.question_content:
The two-way frequency table below shows data on mindset and attendance at practice for students in Mateus's study.

 | Growth mindset | Fixed mindset
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Attended every practice**  | $28$| $12$
**Missed at least $1$ practice** | $9$ | $58$

 | Growth mindset | Fixed mindset | Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Attended every practice** | [[☃ numeric-input 1]]| [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | $1.00$
**Missed at least $1$ practice** | [[☃ numeric-input 3]] | [[☃ numeric-input 4]] | $1.00$
hints:
Frequency table with row totals:

 | Growth mindset | Fixed mindset|Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Attended every practice**  | $28$| $12$|$\blue{40}$
**Missed at least $1$ practice** | $9$ | $58$ | $\pink{67}$

**Two-way table of row relative frequencies:**

 | Growth mindset | Fixed mindset|Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Attended every practice**   | $\dfrac{28}{\blue{40}}=0.70$| $\dfrac{12}{\blue{40}}= 0.30$ |  $\dfrac{\blue{40}}{\blue{40}} = 1.00$
**Missed at least $1$ practice** | $\dfrac{9}{\pink{67}}\approx 0.13$ | $\dfrac{58}{\pink{67}}\approx 0.87$ | $\dfrac{\pink{67}}{\pink{67}} = 1.00$

**Male** | $14$ | $5$

(If necessary, round your answers to the nearest hundredth.)

 | Pass | Fail | Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:

**Male** | $14$ | $5$|$\pink{19}$

**Two-way table of row relative frequencies:**

 | Pass | Fail | Row total
- | :-: | :-: | :-:
**Female**   | $\dfrac{42}{\blue{57}}\approx 0.74$| $\dfrac{15}{\blue{57}}\approx 0.26$ |  $\dfrac{\blue{57}}{\blue{57}} = 1.00$
**Male** | $\dfrac{14}{\pink{19}}\approx 0.74$ | $\dfrac{5}{\pink{19}}\approx 0.26$ | $\dfrac{\pink{19}}{\pink{19}} = 1.00$
